subject: [RFC PATCH 15/40] mm: page_alloc: add background superpageblock defragmentation worker

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch adds a background worker that defragments superpageblocks when free space is low. The worker evacuates movable pages from tainted superpageblocks, improving memory utilization and reducing fragmentation. Defragmentation is triggered when a tainted superpageblock has less than two free pageblocks or three pageblocks worth of free pages. The worker uses an event-driven approach to target specific superpageblocks in need of defragmentation, rather than scanning the entire system. This patch also introduces per-superpageblock defrag work and irq work fields for memory-hotplug correctness.
